# Sendu
> Send money make progress.
> Sendu is a Ugandan-founded embedded banking infrastructure company.
> We build sovereign payment and savings rails that capture financial
> behaviour and convert it into credit decisions for banks.
> Corporate structure: Sendu Holdings Ltd (UK HoldCo) and
> Sendu Uganda Ltd (OpsCo).
## Core Pages
- [Home](https://sendu.ug/): Company mission, market overview, product summary
- [Circle](https://sendu.ug/circle): Live product. Digital savings group
management and lending infrastructure for SACCOs in Kampala.
- [Platform](https://sendu.ug/platform): Five-product architecture: Pay, Circle,
Till, Float, Rating.
- [White Paper](https://sendu.ug/whitepaper): Thesis — "The Dormant Majority."
Uganda's financial inclusion problem is activation of dormant accounts.
- [Team](https://sendu.ug/team): Founders, executives, and advisors.
## For Specific Audiences
- [For Investors](https://sendu.ug/investors): $1.5M pilot round. SEIS/EIS
eligible. Traction summary. Deck request.
- [For Banks](https://sendu.ug/banks): Partnership model. Rating API. Dormant
account activation. 132-signal credit scoring.
- [Journey](https://sendu.ug/journey): Field dispatches, user stories, and build
updates from Kampala.
- [Careers](https://sendu.ug/careers): Open roles in Kampala.
## Key Facts
- Market: Uganda. 33 million active mobile money users. 21 million underbanked
with dormant bank accounts.
- Products: Pay (building), Circle (live), Till (pilot), Float (pilot), Rating
(active, MVP subset).
- Circle deployment: 3 SACCOs in Kampala. 3,525 members. 30 behavioural signals
per member.
- Rating: 132 signals across 7 groups. Variance economics. gnuGrid and Compuscan
CRB integration.
- Revenue: Transaction fees. 60/40 revenue share on attributed loans. Rating API
SaaS licensing.
- MDI Partners: FINCA Uganda, Pride Microfinance.
- Payment integration: Yo! Payments (sole provider, BoU-licensed PSP).
- Corporate: Sendu Holdings Ltd (UK HoldCo) → Sendu Uganda Ltd (OpsCo).
- Fundraising: $1.5M pilot round. SEIS/EIS eligible for UK qualifying investors.
- Team: Byron Biroli (MD, Founder), Magdalena Kurylowicz (COO, Head of Risk, CoFounder), Kenneth Buhiire (CTO), Rob Phillpott (Executive Chair), Gordian
Kyomukama (Telecoms & Regulatory), Jacque Namwase (Financial Growth Officer),
Varghese Thambi (Advisor, Bank Partnerships).
